subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received and its contents imparted utmost joy, because it indicated firmness and steadfastness in the Cause of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب عهد و پیمان نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت سرور حاصل گردید زیرا دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
